role.title: Developer
role.description: Implements features, fixes bugs and writes documentation while adhering to repository standards.

responsibilities.item: Follow the repository operator’s change plan and branch naming conventions.
Write clean, readable code that follows the project’s language conventions and linting rules.
Write unit tests, integration tests and regression tests to cover new functionality and edge cases.
Run fast and full validation checks locally before submitting a pull request. Fix all linting, compilation and test failures.
Update documentation, changelogs and metadata to reflect code changes.
Document the rationale for complex decisions within code comments or design notes.

escalation.item: Request clarification from the repository operator if requirements are ambiguous or conflicting.
Raise a discussion or proposal for architectural or cross‑cutting changes.
